zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Harrington於1502年出生在英國英格蘭盧特藍德艾可頓時，她的父親Sir John Harrington32歲，母親Lady Alice Southhill40歲。她於大約1528年與Rowland Flower在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1585年享年83歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Harrington于1502年出生在英国英格兰盧特藍德艾可頓时，她的父亲Sir John Harrington32岁，母亲Lady Alice Southhill40岁。她于大约1528年与Rowland Flower在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1585年享年83岁。

nameMeanings.name: Harrington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Harrington (Cumberland, Lincolnshire, Northamptonshire). The Cumberland placename derives from the Old English personal name Hæfer + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The Lincolnshire placename derives from the Old English personal name Hearra + Old English connective -ing- + tūn. The Northamptonshire derives from an Old English personal name Hǣthhere + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Herendeen .
Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hArrachtáin ‘descendant of Arrachtán’, a personal name from a diminutive of arrachtach ‘mighty, powerful’.
Irish: in Kerry, this name was adopted as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hIongardail, later Ó hUrdáil, ‘descendant of Iongardal’, a personal name of uncertain origin.

variants.name: Herington
meanings: English: variant of   Harrington   or   Herrington  .

variants.name: Herrington
meanings: habitational name from Heronden in Tenterden (Kent) or Herrington in Houghton (Durham). The Kent placename may derive from an Old English personal name Hȳra + Old English connective -ing- + denn ‘pasture’, while the Durham placename may come from Old English hæring ‘rocky place’ (from hær ‘rock, heap of stones’ + the placename forming suffix -ing) or hæren ‘rocky’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Arrington
meanings: variant of Harrington with loss of initial H-.
possibly a habitational name from Arrington, a place in Cambridgeshire, named from an Old English byname, Earn(a), meaning ‘eagle’ + -inga- ‘people or followers of’ + tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Harrington was born in 1502, in Exton, Rutland, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Harrington, was 32 and her mother, Lady Alice Southhill, was 40. She married Rowland Flower about 1528, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1585, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Harrington est née en 1502, à Exton, Rutland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Harrington, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice Southhill, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Rowland Flower environ 1528, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1585, à l’âge de 83 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Harrington 1502 in Exton, Rutland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Harrington 32 und ihre Mutter Lady Alice Southhill 40. Sie hat um 1528 in England Rowland Flower geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1585 im Alter von 83 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Harrington è nata il nel 1502 nel Exton, Rutland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John Harrington, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Lady Alice Southhill, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Rowland Flower circa 1528, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1585, all'età di 83 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Harrington(이)가 1502년 영국 잉글랜드 루틀랜드 스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Harrington(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Alice Southhill(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 대략 1528년 영국에서 Rowland Flower(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1585년 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Harrington nasceu em 1502, em Exton, Rutland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Harrington, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice Southhill, tinha 40 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Harrington родилась в 1502 г. в местности экстон, рутланд, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Harrington было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Southhill, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Rowland Flower около 1528 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1585 г. в возрасте 83 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Harrington nació en 1502, en Exton, Rutland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Harrington, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Lady Alice Southhill, tenía 40 años.
